[[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] '''Streln''' was an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] agent on [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]] after to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Along with [[Gonrey]] and [[Vypass]], they helped design the [[YI-5 Surveillance/Interrogation droid|YI-5]] probe droid. [[Ysanne Isard]] ordered the execution of the three when it was revealed that the probes, like her, would have blue and red eyes; however, she later decided to spare them, assuming it was an innocent mistake.

{{Char-stub}}
